title: Project Report: House Price Predictor — ML / AI Engineer
author: Gagan Pasupuleti
summary: End-to-end regression with scikit-learn: EDA notebook, feature engineering, model training, evaluation.
source_file: CodeQuest project specification (official docs + industry patterns)

chapters.title: Project Overview
chapters.content:
**Chapter focus: Project Overview** *(Level: Beginner)*

**House Price Predictor** is a beginner-level end-to-end project for ML / AI Engineer. Duration: 2 weeks. End-to-end regression with scikit-learn: EDA notebook, feature engineering, model training, evaluation. Tools: Python, scikit-learn, Jupyter, matplotlib.

Code Reference:
```text
Objective: Exploratory data analysis notebook
Objective: Train/test split with preprocessing pipeline
Objective: Evaluate RMSE and R²
Objective: Save model with joblib
```
What it shows: Lists measurable outcomes before you start building.

### What it actually is
A project overview defines scope, tools, and success criteria.

### When to use it
At project kickoff.

### Where to use it
ML / AI Engineer portfolios and CodeQuest project submissions.

### Real use example
A candidate lists this project on a ML / AI Engineer resume with a demo link.
key_takeaways: A project overview defines scope, tools, and success criteria.
A candidate lists this project on a ML / AI Engineer resume with a demo link.

chapters.content:
**Chapter focus: Phase: EDA** *(Level: Beginner)*

Jupyter exploration. Complete these tasks: Missing values; Correlations. Deliverable for this phase: EDA notebook.

Code Reference:

```text
- [ ] Missing values
- [ ] Correlations
```

chapters.title: Final Deliverables and Review
chapters.content:
**Chapter focus: Final Deliverables and Review** *(Level: Beginner)*

Submit all final deliverables: Jupyter notebook; model.pkl; Evaluation report. Skills demonstrated: scikit-learn, pandas, EDA. Prepare a 5-minute walkthrough video and README for CodeQuest teacher marking.

Code Reference:
```text
Deliverable: Jupyter notebook
Deliverable: model.pkl
Deliverable: Evaluation report
```
What it shows: Final checklist ensures nothing is missing at submission.

### What it actually is
Deliverable review confirms end-to-end project completion.

### When to use it
Before deadline and teacher review.

### Where to use it
CodeQuest project gallery and interviews.

### Real use example
A student submits Jupyter notebook and passes the rubric.
